author: laurence brannigan
content: I highly recommend: Ashley came out at very short notice and on a Sunday morning to survey our last minute request for an outdoor power socket to enable our builders to have power without accessing the house. The builders started Monday and Ashley was on site at 9am fitting a double socket for us. A gentleman and clearly excellent and experienced in his trade. I highly recommend Ashley and Renegade Electrical. Work carried out 29th April 2024.
